name: Senior Full Stack React/Node.js
jdText: We are looking for a Senior Full Stack Engineer to join our fintech team. You will be responsible for building and maintaining our React-based web application and Node.js backend services. Required skills: React, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Docker. Nice to have: Kubernetes, Redis, CI/CD. You should have experience with microservices architecture, RESTful APIs, and automated testing. At least 5 years of experience required.
notes: Core engineering role — strong match with profile

name: Frontend Engineer Angular
jdText: Frontend Engineer needed for a fast-growing SaaS platform. Must have strong experience with Angular, TypeScript, and RxJS. Should be proficient with NgRx state management, component architecture, and responsive design. Experience with unit testing (Jest/Karma) and E2E testing (Cypress) is required. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines is a plus.

name: AI Platform Engineer
jdText: Join our AI team building next-generation conversational AI evaluation tools. We need a Platform Engineer experienced in TypeScript, Node.js, Redis, and PostgreSQL. You will design distributed execution engines, message queue systems (BullMQ/Kafka), and integrate with LLM providers. Experience with Python and FastAPI is a bonus. Must have experience with Docker and container orchestration.
notes: Strong match with AgentQA project experience
